docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; python - <<"PY"
import json
import shlex
from pathlib import Path

site_path = Path("/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend/site_config.json")
common_path = Path("/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/common_site_config.json")

site = json.loads(site_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
common = json.loads(common_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

site["db_host"] = common["db_host"]
site["db_port"] = int(common.get("db_port", 3306))
site["db_type"] = "mariadb"
site["db_password"] = "FrontDbPass2026!"

site_path.write_text(json.dumps(site, indent=1) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

env_lines = [
    f"export DB_HOST={shlex.quote(str(site['db_host']))}",
    f"export DB_PORT={shlex.quote(str(site.get('db_port', 3306)))}",
    f"export DB_NAME={shlex.quote(str(site['db_name']))}",
    f"export DB_USER={shlex.quote(str(site['db_user']))}",
    f"export DB_PASS={shlex.quote(str(site['db_password']))}",
]
Path("/tmp/frontend_db.env").write_text("\n".join(env_lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
print("Prepared frontend DB config and /tmp/frontend_db.env")
PY; source /tmp/frontend_db.env; echo DB_HOST=$DB_HOST DB_PORT=$DB_PORT DB_NAME=$DB_NAME DB_USER=$DB_USER; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS \\`$DB_NAME\\` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS';"; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "ALTER USER '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS';"; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON \\`$DB_NAME\\`.* TO '$DB_USER'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"; bench --site frontend migrate'
